member.name: T:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ContainersController
member.summary: Container management API controller.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ContainersController.CreateContainer(HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateContainerRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new container using specified backend (HCS or WMI).

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ContainersController.ListContainers
member.summary: Lists all containers from both HCS and WMI backends.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ContainersController.GetContainer(System.String)
member.summary: Gets container information by ID.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ContainersController.StartContainer(System.String)
member.summary: Starts a container by ID.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ContainersController.StopContainer(System.String)
member.summary: Stops a container by ID.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ContainersController.TerminateContainer(System.String)
member.summary: Terminates a container by ID.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ContainersController.PauseContainer(System.String)
member.summary: Pauses a container by ID.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ContainersController.ResumeContainer(System.String)
member.summary: Resumes a container by ID.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ContainersController.DeleteContainer(System.String)
member.summary: Deletes a container by ID.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.HostController.GetHardware
member.summary: Gets host hardware information.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.HostController.GetSystem
member.summary: Gets system information (OS details).

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.HostController.GetPerformance
member.summary: Gets current performance summary.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.HostController.GetRecentTasks(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets recent tasks (last hour by default).
member.param: Number of tasks (default: 10).

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.HostController.GetHostDetails
member.summary: Gets combined host details (hardware, system, performance).

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.HostController.GetHostStats
member.summary: Gets performance stats (CPU, memory, storage).

member.name: T:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.HostDetails
member.summary: Combined host details model.

member.name: T:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ImageManagementController
member.summary: Controller for managing virtual hard disk (VHD/VHDX) operations including compact, merge, convert, resize, and snapshot operations.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ImageManagementController.CompactVirtualHardDisk(HyperV.Contracts.Models.CompactVhdRequest)
member.summary: Compacts a virtual hard disk by removing unused space.
member.param: Compact operation parameters including path and mode.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ImageManagementController.MergeVirtualHardDisk(HyperV.Contracts.Models.MergeDiskRequest)
member.summary: Merges a child virtual hard disk with its parent.
member.param: Merge operation parameters including source and destination paths.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ImageManagementController.GetVirtualHardDiskSettingData(System.String)
member.summary: Gets virtual hard disk setting data including type, format, and size information.
member.param: Path to the virtual hard disk file.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ImageManagementController.GetVirtualHardDiskState(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the current state of a virtual hard disk including operational status.
member.param: Path to the virtual hard disk file.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ImageManagementController.ConvertVirtualHardDisk(HyperV.Contracts.Models.ConvertVhdRequest)
member.summary: Converts a virtual hard disk to a different format or type.
member.param: Conversion parameters including source, destination, and format options.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ImageManagementController.ConvertVirtualHardDiskToVHDSet(HyperV.Contracts.Models.ConvertToVhdSetRequest)
member.summary: Converts a virtual hard disk to VHD Set format.
member.param: VHD Set conversion parameters.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ImageManagementController.DeleteVHDSnapshot(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Deletes a VHD snapshot from a VHD Set.
member.param: Path to the VHD Set file.
ID of the snapshot to delete.
member.returns: Success response when snapshot is deleted.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ImageManagementController.FindMountedStorageImageInstance(System.String)
member.summary: Finds mounted storage image instances for a given image path.
member.param: Path to the storage image file.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ImageManagementController.GetVHDSetInformation(System.String)
member.summary: Gets VHD Set information including snapshots and properties.
member.param: Path to the VHD Set file.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ImageManagementController.GetVHDSnapshotInformation(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets information about a specific VHD snapshot.
member.param: Path to the VHD Set file.
ID of the snapshot to retrieve.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ImageManagementController.GetVirtualDiskChanges(HyperV.Contracts.Models.GetVirtualDiskChangesRequest)
member.summary: Gets virtual disk changes since a specific change tracking ID.
member.param: Request parameters including VHD Set path and change tracking information.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ImageManagementController.OptimizeVHDSet(System.String)
member.summary: Optimizes a VHD Set by performing maintenance operations.
member.param: Path to the VHD Set file to optimize.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ImageManagementController.SetVHDSnapshotInformation(HyperV.Contracts.Models.SetVhdSnapshotInfoRequest)
member.summary: Sets information for a VHD snapshot including name, description, and active state.
member.param: Snapshot information update parameters.
member.returns: Success response when snapshot information is updated.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ImageManagementController.ValidatePersistentReservationSupport(System.String)
member.summary: Validates whether a storage path supports persistent reservations.
member.param: Path to validate for persistent reservation support.
member.returns: Boolean indicating whether persistent reservations are supported.

member.name: T:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.JobsController
member.summary: Operacje na zadaniach związanych z pamięcią masową.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.JobsController.GetStorageJobs
member.summary: Pobiera listę wszystkich zadań związanych z pamięcią masową.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.JobsController.GetStorageJob(System.String)
member.summary: Pobiera szczegóły konkretnego zadania związanego z pamięcią masową.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.JobsController.GetJobAffectedElements(System.String)
member.summary: Pobiera elementy, na które wpływa zadanie.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.JobsController.CancelStorageJob(System.String)
member.summary: Anuluje zadanie związane z pamięcią masową.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.JobsController.DeleteStorageJob(System.String)
member.summary: Usuwa zakończone zadanie związane z pamięcią masową.

member.name: T:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.NetworksController
member.summary: Operacje sieciowe (HCN).

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.NetworksController.ListNetworks
member.summary: Listuje wszystkie sieci HCN i WMI.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.NetworksController.ListPhysicalAdapters
member.summary: Listuje fizyczne adaptery sieciowe.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.NetworksController.CreateWmiSwitch(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Tworzy wirtualny przełącznik WMI.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.NetworksController.UpdateWmiSwitch(System.Guid,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Edytuje wirtualny przełącznik WMI.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.NetworksController.DeleteNetwork(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Usuwa sieć.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.NetworksController.GetNetworkProperties(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Pobiera właściwości sieci.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.NetworksController.CreateEndpoint(System.Guid,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Tworzy endpoint w sieci.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.NetworksController.DeleteEndpoint(System.Guid)
member.summary: Usuwa endpoint.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.NetworksController.GetEndpointProperties(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Pobiera właściwości endpoint.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.NetworksController.SetSwitchExtensionState(System.Guid,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Enables or disables a switch extension.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.NetworksController.CheckTrunkMode(System.Guid)
member.summary: Checks if a switch supports trunk mode.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.NetworksController.CreateSan(HyperV.Agent.Controllers.NetworksController.CreateSanRequest)
member.summary: Creates a SAN pool via FibreChannel service.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.NetworksController.DeleteSan(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes a SAN pool.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.NetworksController.GetSanInfo(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets SAN pool information.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.NetworksController.CreateVirtualFcPort(System.String,HyperV.Agent.Controllers.NetworksController.CreateFcPortRequest)
member.summary: Creates a virtual FC port for a VM.

member.name: T:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.NetworksController.CreateSanRequest
member.summary: Request model for creating SAN.

member.name: T:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.NetworksController.CreateFcPortRequest
member.summary: Request model for creating FC port.

member.name: T:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ServiceController
member.summary: Usługi i diagnostyka agenta.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ServiceController.GetHealth
member.summary: Sprawdza status agenta HyperV.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ServiceController.GetInfo
member.summary: Pobiera informacje o agencie.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.StorageController.GetStorageDevices
member.summary: Lists all fixed storage devices with details (name, filesystem, size, used, free).

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.StorageController.GetSuitableVhdLocations(System.Int64)
member.summary: Gets suitable storage locations for VHDX based on minimum free space.
member.param: Minimum free space in GB (default: 10).

member.name: T:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.StorageQoSController
member.summary: Controller for managing Storage Quality of Service (QoS) policies and their application to virtual machines. Provides REST API endpoints for creating, managing, and applying storage QoS policies that control IOPS and bandwidth limits.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.StorageQoSController.CreateQoSPolicy(HyperV.Agent.Controllers.CreateQoSPolicyRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new Storage QoS policy with specified IOPS and bandwidth limits.
member.param: The QoS policy creation parameters including policy ID, IOPS limit, bandwidth limit, and description.
member.returns: JSON response indicating the creation status of the QoS policy.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.StorageQoSController.DeleteQoSPolicy(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes an existing Storage QoS policy.
member.param: The unique identifier of the QoS policy to delete.
member.returns: Success response if the policy was deleted, or appropriate error if not found.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.StorageQoSController.GetQoSPolicyInfo(System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieves information about a specific Storage QoS policy.
member.param: The unique identifier of the QoS policy to retrieve.
member.returns: JSON response containing the QoS policy details including IOPS and bandwidth limits.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.StorageQoSController.ApplyQoSPolicyToVm(System.String,HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ApplyQoSPolicyRequest)
member.summary: Applies a Storage QoS policy to a virtual machine.
member.param: The name of the virtual machine to apply the policy to.
The request containing the policy ID to apply.
member.returns: Success response if the policy was applied successfully.

member.name: T:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.CreateQoSPolicyRequest
member.summary: Request model for creating a new Storage QoS policy.

member.name: P:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.CreateQoSPolicyRequest.PolicyId
member.summary: The unique identifier for the QoS policy.

member.name: P:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.CreateQoSPolicyRequest.MaxIops
member.summary: The maximum IOPS (Input/Output Operations Per Second) limit for the policy. Set to 0 for unlimited IOPS.

member.name: P:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.CreateQoSPolicyRequest.MaxBandwidth
member.summary: The maximum bandwidth limit in bytes per second for the policy. Set to 0 for unlimited bandwidth.

member.name: P:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.CreateQoSPolicyRequest.Description
member.summary: Optional description for the QoS policy.

member.name: T:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ApplyQoSPolicyRequest
member.summary: Request model for applying a QoS policy to a virtual machine.

member.name: P:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.ApplyQoSPolicyRequest.PolicyId
member.summary: The unique identifier of the QoS policy to apply.

member.name: T:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController
member.summary: Operacje na maszynach wirtualnych (VM).

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.Create(HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmRequest)
member.summary: Utwórz nową maszynę wirtualną.
member.param: Parametry VM.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.VmPresent(System.String)
member.summary: Sprawdza, czy istnieje maszyna o podanej nazwie (HCS lub WMI).

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.StartVm(System.String)
member.summary: Uruchamia maszynę wirtualną.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.StopVm(System.String)
member.summary: Zatrzymuje maszynę wirtualną.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.ShutdownVm(System.String)
member.summary: Wyłącza maszynę wirtualną (graceful shutdown).

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.TerminateVm(System.String)
member.summary: Terminuje maszynę wirtualną (force stop).

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.PauseVm(System.String)
member.summary: Wstrzymuje maszynę wirtualną.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.ResumeVm(System.String)
member.summary: Wznawia maszynę wirtualną.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.SaveVm(System.String)
member.summary: Zapisuje stan maszyny wirtualnej.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.GetVmProperties(System.String)
member.summary: Pobiera właściwości maszyny wirtualnej.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.ModifyVm(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Modyfikuje konfigurację maszyny wirtualnej.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.ListVms
member.summary: Listuje wszystkie maszyny wirtualne.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.ConfigureVm(System.String,HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmConfigurationRequest)
member.summary: Modyfikuje konfigurację VM (pamięć, CPU, notatki).

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.ListVmSnapshots(System.String)
member.summary: Listuje snapshoty maszyny wirtualnej.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.CreateVmSnapshot(System.String,HyperV.Agent.Controllers.CreateSnapshotRequest)
member.summary: Tworzy snapshot maszyny wirtualnej.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.DeleteVmSnapshot(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Usuwa snapshot maszyny wirtualnej.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.RevertVmToSnapshot(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Przywraca VM do snapshotu.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.GetVmStorageDevices(System.String)
member.summary: Pobiera listę urządzeń pamięci masowej w maszynie wirtualnej.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.AddVmStorageDevice(System.String,HyperV.Contracts.Models.AddStorageDeviceRequest)
member.summary: Dodaje urządzenie pamięci masowej do maszyny wirtualnej.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.RemoveVmStorageDevice(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Usuwa urządzenie pamięci masowej z maszyny wirtualnej.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.GetVmStorageControllers(System.String)
member.summary: Pobiera listę kontrolerów pamięci masowej w maszynie wirtualnej.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.GetVmStorageDrives(System.String)
member.summary: Pobiera listę dysków wirtualnych w maszynie wirtualnej.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.GetVmStorageDrive(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Pobiera szczegóły konkretnego dysku wirtualnego.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.GetVmStorageDriveState(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Pobiera stan dysku wirtualnego.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.ResetVmStorageDrive(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Resetuje dysk wirtualny.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.LockVmStorageDriveMedia(System.String,System.String,HyperV.Agent.Controllers.LockMediaRequest)
member.summary: Blokuje/odblokowuje nośnik w dysku wirtualnym.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.GetVmStorageDriveCapabilities(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Pobiera możliwości dysku wirtualnego.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.ExtractMemoryFromHcsProperties(System.Text.Json.JsonDocument)
member.summary: Extracts memory information from HCS properties JSON.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.ExtractProcessorsFromHcsProperties(System.Text.Json.JsonDocument)
member.summary: Extracts processor information from HCS properties JSON.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.GetWmiVmResourceSettings(System.String)
member.summary: Gets WMI VM resource settings (memory and CPU).

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.BulkStartVms(HyperV.Agent.Controllers.BulkVmOperationRequest)
member.summary: Starts multiple VMs in bulk.
member.param: List of VM IDs to start.
member.returns: Bulk operation response with progress tracking.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.BulkStopVms(HyperV.Agent.Controllers.BulkVmOperationRequest)
member.summary: Stops multiple VMs in bulk.
member.param: List of VM IDs to stop.
member.returns: Bulk operation response with progress tracking.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.BulkShutdownVms(HyperV.Agent.Controllers.BulkVmOperationRequest)
member.summary: Shuts down multiple VMs in bulk.
member.param: List of VM IDs to shutdown.
member.returns: Bulk operation response with progress tracking.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.BulkTerminateVms(HyperV.Agent.Controllers.BulkVmOperationRequest)
member.summary: Terminates multiple VMs in bulk.
member.param: List of VM IDs to terminate.
member.returns: Bulk operation response with progress tracking.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.PerformVmOperation(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Performs a VM operation on a single VM.
member.param: VM identifier.
Operation to perform (start, stop, shutdown, terminate).

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.GetVmMemoryStatus(System.String)
member.summary: Gets dynamic memory status for a VM.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.GetSlpDataRoot(System.String)
member.summary: Gets SLP data root for a VM.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.ModifySlpDataRoot(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Modifies SLP data root for a VM.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.QueryMetricCollectionEnabled(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Queries if metric collection is enabled for a VM and metric.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.EnumerateDiscreteMetrics(System.String)
member.summary: Enumerates discrete metrics for a VM.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.EnableVmMetricsCollection(System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Enables metric collection for a VM.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.EnumerateResourcePoolMetrics(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Enumerates metrics for a resource pool.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.GetVmGeneration(System.String)
member.summary: Gets VM generation type.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.GetSecureBoot(System.String)
member.summary: Gets secure boot state for a VM.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.SetSecureBoot(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets secure boot state for a VM.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.GetBootOrder(System.String)
member.summary: Gets boot order for a VM.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.SetBootOrder(System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Sets boot order for a VM.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.MigrateVm(System.String,HyperV.Agent.Controllers.MigrateRequest)
member.summary: Migrates a VM to another host.
member.param: VM name.
Migration parameters.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.GetAppHealth(System.String)
member.summary: Gets application health status for a VM.
member.param: VM name.

member.name: M:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.VmsController.CopyFileToGuest(System.String,HyperV.Agent.Controllers.GuestFileRequest)
member.summary: Copies a file to the guest VM.
member.param: VM name.
File copy parameters.

member.summary: Request model for locking/unlocking media.

member.summary: Request model for VM configuration.

member.summary: Request model for creating snapshots.

member.summary: Request model for VM migration.

member.summary: Response model for app health.

member.name: T:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.GuestFileRequest
member.summary: Request model for guest file copy.

member.name: T:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.BulkVmOperationRequest
member.summary: Request model for bulk VM operations.

member.summary: Response model for bulk VM operations.

member.name: T:HyperV.Agent.Controllers.BulkVmOperationResult
member.summary: Result model for individual VM operation in bulk operations.

member.name: T:HyperV.Agent.Services.InMemoryJobService
member.summary: Temporary in-memory implementation of IJobService. In a real scenario this would query underlying WMI / VHD APIs or a persistent store for long-running storage jobs.
